files.description:
Images, Documents, Audios(future) and Videos(future)
  all get added to the investigation vector database to be
  used in the investigation.

fields.type: STRING (The type of file. The allowed values are image, pdf for now.)
fields.owner: INTEGER (The persons file is associated with.)

phone_numbers.description: Phone numbers associated with the person.

fields.type: INTEGER (The user defined type of phones. Definitions are created in Category)
fields.owner: INTEGER (The persons who uses this phone number.)

fields.type: INTEGER (The user defined type of email. Definitions are created in Category)
fields.owner: INTEGER (The persons who uses this email.)

fields.type: INTEGER (The user defined type of address. Definitions are created in Category)
fields.name: STRING (The user defined name of address.)
fields.address_2: STRING (The apartment number associated with the address.)
fields.city: STRING (The city associated with the address.)
fields.state: STRING (The state associated with the address.)
fields.zip_5: INTEGER (The 5 digit zip code associated with the address.)
fields.zip_4: INTEGER (The 4 digit zip code associated with the address.)
fields.owner: INTEGER (The persons who uses this address.)

events.description:
Events related to the missing person
  that might hold weight in the investigation.
  identifiers: name, description, date_from

fields.type: INTEGER (The user defined type of Events. Definitions are created in Category)
fields.name: STRING (The name of the event.)
fields.date_from: DATETIME (The start date of the event.)
fields.date_to: DATETIME (The end date of the event if there is one.)
fields.owner: INTEGER (The persons the event is associated with.)

fields.name: STRING (The name of the note.)
fields.lead: TEXT (Stores the raw narrative, GPS location if provided, reference to agency who repoted it.)
fields.owner: INTEGER (The persons the note is associated with.)
INTEGER (The persons who uses this alias.)

people.description:
The person class holds just the description of the person but is the
  center point for adding all information about them into the investigation
  vector database.

fields.type: INTEGER (The type of user. Types are defined in Category. There is an immutable Missing Person value. All other values can be added and changed by the user.)
fields.hair_color: STRING (The hair color of the person.)
fields.ssn: STRING (The persons SSN. This is used here to check if someone is trying to use there credit in a nefarious way.)
fields.gender: STRING (The gender of the person. Allowed values are male and female.)
fields.data_of_birth: DATETIME (The date of birth of the person.)
fields.primary_language: STRING (The primary language of the person.)
fields.missing: DATETIME (The date the missing person went missing or the date that the person of interest met the missing person.)
fields.description: TEXT (A place to add more descriptive information about the person.)
fields.owner: INTEGER (This will be 0 if a missing person(Level 1). If level 2 contacts then this will be the missing persons id. If level 3 then this will be the person of interests id that they knew. This can get crazy big in memory usage as you continue to level up etc..)
